params.name: Aladdin's Carpet
params.description:
On Jun 24, 700 AD, Aladdin rode the flying carpet to find his own princess.
Aladdin climbed onto the magic carpet in disbelief and was startled as it took flight. There are no controls on a magic carpet. There are no propellers, engines, or turbines. Instead, it is propelled by the very air around it. From up here, the user can quickly locate the target from a bird's eye view.
